variants: Tessa Merz was born in Barleyshade Downs, a quaint village known for its scenic views and close-knit community. Currently, she resides in Mountainberry Turn, where she has become an integral part of the local farming scene. Employed at Meadowrun Farms, she contributes her expertise to sustainable agriculture. Tessa is also recognized for her achievement in innovation, having received the Crystal Feather Distinction. In addition to her work in farming, she authored the book Quartz Halo Circuit, which explores advancements in agricultural technology.
